books.title: Codefolio Onboarding
books.description: An engineer's tour of this codebase — what each module does, how requests flow end-to-end, and how to extend the project. Read this before opening a PR.

books.title: Distributed Systems Notes
books.description: Field notes from books and courses on distributed systems — consistency, replication, the CAP theorem, and the seminal papers behind modern infra.
